# Research Plan: Bootstrap Confidence Intervals for Small-Sample Eval Metrics

## Sub-areas
- Resampling schemes (percentile, BCa, studentized)
- Coverage behaviour at small sample sizes
- Bias correction and acceleration estimation
- Paired versus unpaired difference intervals

## Out-of-scope
- Bayesian credible intervals
- Asymptotic normal-approximation intervals

## Claim family taxonomy
- Coverage-accuracy claims (does the stated interval contain the true value at the nominal rate?)
- Computational-cost claims (number of resamples versus runtime)
- Robustness claims (behaviour under class imbalance and degenerate draws)
